title: No output from Extract from File node
symptom: The workflow stops with no output when using the Extract from File node inside a loop. This occurs even when multiple files are processed.
applies_when: Processing multiple CSV files in a loop
not_this_if: Single file processing works without issues
root_cause: The Extract from File node fails to produce output when the input files are not correctly formatted. In this case, a missing semicolon in the header of the CSV file caused the node to stop processing.
fix_steps: Check the format of the CSV files being processed
Ensure that all required delimiters and headers are present
Test the workflow again after correcting any formatting issues
agent_instruction: Verify the CSV file format and correct any errors before processing.
